// purpose: Repo-defined VS Code tasks so contributors can run the most-used pnpm scripts with Ctrl+Shift+B (Verify all) or Ctrl+Shift+P > Tasks: Run Task. Mirrors package.json scripts but exposes them in the Command Palette so they don't get lost.

tasks.label: Verify all
tasks.detail: Run every gate before pushing: typecheck + unit tests + wireframe validator + PHI auditor + e2e-live
tasks.command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:unit && pnpm validate:wireframe && pnpm audit:phi && pnpm test:e2e

tasks.label: Dev API (wrangler)
tasks.detail: Start the API Worker dev server on http://localhost:8787

tasks.label: Dev Web (Vite)
tasks.detail: Start the React dev server on http://localhost:5173

tasks.label: Diagnose IDE noise
tasks.detail: Run the Python diagnostic for VS Code Problems-panel signal

tasks.label: Audit PHI
tasks.detail: Scan source for PHI-suggestive identifiers (no-PHI invariant)

tasks.label: Validate wireframe
tasks.detail: Cross-layer wireframe ↔ code ↔ tests ↔ production sync check
